---
title: "Quarto Websites: Create and Publish Your First Website"
description: "A hands-on workshop for researchers, students, and practitioners."
author: "Harsha Chamara Hewage"
date: "2025-11-12"
image: "cover.png"
categories:
  - R
  - Quarto
  - Github
link-external-newwindow: true
---

```{=html}
<!-- Add Font Awesome for icons -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">


<div class="hero-section">
  <h1 class="title">Quarto Websites: Create and Publish Your First Website</h1>
  <p class="description">A hands-on workshop for researchers, students, and practitioners.</p>
  <p class="author-date">Harsha Chamara Hewage | 2025-11-12</p>
  <div class="cta-buttons">
    <a href="slides/quarto_website.html" target="_blank" class="btn-custom btn-primary">
      <i class="fas fa-bookmark"></i> View Slides
    </a>
    <a href="https://github.com/chamara7h/quarto_website_template" target="_blank" class="btn-custom btn-secondary">
      <i class="fab fa-github"></i> GitHub Repo
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="content-section">
  <h2>Who is the Course For?</h2>
  <p>This course is designed for researchers, students, and practitioners, who wish to create a personal or project website using the Quarto framework.</p>
  <p>It assumes familiarity with R and RStudio, but no prior experience with HTML, CSS, or GitHub Pages is required.</p>
</div>

<div class="content-section">
  <h2>Learning Objectives</h2>
  <div class="objectives-grid">
    <div class="objective-card">
      <div class="icon"><i class="fas fa-link"></i></div>
      <p>Set up and connect <strong>Git with RStudio</strong></p>
    </div>
    <div class="objective-card">
      <div class="icon"><i class="fas fa-globe"></i></div>
      <p>Build and preview a <strong>basic website</strong> using Quarto templates</p>
    </div>
    <div class="objective-card">
      <div class="icon"><i class="fas fa-palette"></i></div>
      <p>Customize website appearance using <strong>YAML</strong></p>
    </div>
    <div class="objective-card">
      <div class="icon"><i class="fas fa-file-alt"></i></div>
      <p>Create <strong>multiple pages</strong>, listings, and navigation bars</p>
    </div>
    <div class="objective-card">
      <div class="icon"><i class="fas fa-cloud-upload-alt"></i></div>
      <p><strong>Publish</strong> the website using GitHub Pages and GitHub Actions</p>
    </div>
    <div class="objective-card">
      <div class="icon"><i class="fas fa-share-alt"></i></div>
      <p>Understand how websites can be used to share research and project outputs</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="content-section">
  <h2>Prerequisites (Before the Training)</h2>
  <ul class="prereq-list">
    <li>Install <strong>R</strong>, <strong>RStudio</strong>, <strong>RTools</strong> (for Windows users), <strong>Quarto</strong>, and <strong>Git</strong>.</li>
    <li>Create a GitHub account.</li>
    <li>Install required R packages: <code>install.packages(c("usethis", "gitcreds"))</code></li>
    <li>Ensure you are comfortable using `.qmd` files, the R Console, the Terminal, and basic GitHub navigation.</li>
    <li>Bring a photo of yourself (.jpg or .png) and prepare a short personal introduction (3–4 lines).</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="content-section">
  <h2>Topics & Structure</h2>
  <table>
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th>Section</th>
        <th>Topic</th>
        <th>Activities</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td>1</td>
        <td>Connect RStudio with Git</td>
        <td>Live demo + setup + token config</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>2</td>
        <td>Build the Homepage</td>
        <td>Use <code>quarto use template</code></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>3</td>
        <td>Styling your Website</td>
        <td>Modify <code>_quarto.yml</code></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>4</td>
        <td>Pages and Navigation</td>
        <td>Add `.qmd` pages and navbar</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>5</td>
        <td>Listings</td>
        <td>Create blog/projects listings</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>6</td>
        <td>Publish using GitHub Pages</td>
        <td>Configure workflow + publish</td>
      </tr>
       <tr>
        <td>7</td>
        <td>Wrap-up & Q&A</td>
        <td>Share published sites</td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

```
